hero.badge: Bainbridge Island · North Seattle · Licensed Master Electrician · Est. 2016
hero.headline: Permitted. Inspected. Done Right.

intro.label: A licensed electrical studio, not a gray-area operation
intro.body: A licensed master electrician serving Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods. Every permit pulled, every circuit inspected, every job done to code — no gray-area DIY risk, no callbacks.

personas.label: Emergency & Repair
personas.kicker: For the problem that can't wait

configuratorTeaser.headline: Get an electrical estimate in under a minute.
configuratorTeaser.body: Tell us what you need and we'll return a transparent price range before any call.

zPatternRows.label: Emergency First
zPatternRows.headline: No power, burning smell, or sparking outlet? That's a right-now problem.
zPatternRows.body: Licensed tech on-site same day for true electrical emergencies. Flat-rate diagnostic quote before any work starts. Not because it sounds good — because a failing main breaker or arcing outlet is a fire risk that doesn't improve overnight.

zPatternRows.label: EV Charger Done Right
zPatternRows.headline: We check your panel load before we quote the charger.
zPatternRows.body: A Level 2 EVSE needs a dedicated 50A circuit and a panel with capacity to spare. We evaluate before we commit — not after we've already started pulling wire. If the panel needs an upgrade first, we'll tell you and scope both together.

zPatternRows.label: Permit Every Time
zPatternRows.headline: The permit isn't paperwork. It's protection.
zPatternRows.body: Unpermitted electrical work voids homeowner's insurance, creates liability at resale, and — more importantly — means no inspector checked it. Every job that requires a permit gets one. We handle the application and schedule the inspection.

zPatternRows.label: Clean Install
zPatternRows.headline: Circuits labeled. Wiring run clean. Nothing hidden that shouldn't be.
zPatternRows.body: No splice-junction-box shortcuts buried in the wall. Circuits labeled clearly on completion. Wiring run through conduit or properly secured. We close the job the way we'd want it if it were our own house.

portfolio.caption: Level 2 EV charger · Queen Anne garage

footerCta.headline: Ready for electrical work that passes inspection?
footerCta.subhead: We'll be in touch within a few hours to schedule a visit.
